headline: Xi in Pyongyang deepens ties; Shanghai deputy mayor investigated; Taiwan mapping signals strategic intent
headline_zh: 习近平访朝深化关系；上海副市长被查；台海东部扫测信号
narrative: President Xi Jinping's visit to North Korea underscores strategic alignment against US pressure, with joint appearances at a party school and cultural performance reinforcing ideological solidarity. Domestically, the investigation of Shanghai Deputy Mayor Chen Yujian for serious discipline violations continues the anti-corruption campaign's focus on key economic hubs. Meanwhile, the first-ever seabed mapping east of Taiwan by China's maritime authorities enhances surveillance capabilities and signals growing assertiveness in the Taiwan Strait. The market showed broad declines, led by tech-heavy ChiNext, as trade tensions and domestic regulatory tightening weigh on sentiment.
narrative_zh: 习近平主席访朝强化了中朝战略协作，共同出席党校活动和文艺演出，凸显意识形态团结。国内，上海市副市长陈宇剑因严重违纪违法被查，延续了反腐在关键经济区的力度。同时，中国海事首次在台湾岛东部海域完成扫测，提升了对台海及周边水域的监控能力。市场方面，科技股领跌，创业板跌幅超2.7%，反映了贸易紧张与国内监管收紧的双重压力。
